title: leads — authorization policies
description: Three policies, one per owned model. Every ability resolves through spatie/laravel-permission then narrows by tenant scope + role-specific rules (coach sees own-athlete leads only; marketing role restricted to their own leads on update). Platform-plane abilities are read-only on tenant-plane.

abilities.scope: tenant member with reception / marketing / admin / owner / support role. Coach role passes viewAny but each list query is scoped to leads whose converted_athlete_ids intersect the coach's athletes.
same scope narrowing as viewAny; coach-role sees only own-athlete leads.
marketing role can update only leads they own; admin + owner + receptionist can update any tenant lead.
admin + owner only; SoftDeletes trait means the row is preserved for audit.
requires stage IN ('QUALIFIED', 'TRIAL'); refuses on WON / LOST.
inherits the parent Lead's viewAny scope; coach role narrowed to own-athlete leads.
manual touchpoints only; system-generated stage_change / assignment activities are inserted by observers + skip policy checks.
activities are APPEND-ONLY (body / metadata polish handled via a dedicated `patchNote` action).
activities cascade-delete only when the parent Lead is hard-deleted.
receptionist role narrowed to tasks assigned to them or unassigned; admin + owner + marketing see all tenant tasks.
receptionist role can update only tasks assigned to them; admin + owner + marketing can update any tenant task.
admin + owner only. Refuses when status='completed'.
assignee only via policy; admin + owner + marketing override.
